name: @moolam/contract-conformance
description: Internal component of Sutra SDK — applications should install sutra-sdk. Standalone conformance CLI, obligation registry, and deadlined runner for executable @moolam/contracts MUST clauses.

scripts.build: pnpm run fixtures:wire && pnpm run fixtures:kit && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@moolam/contract-conformance --filter=@moolam/cognitive-core && node --test tests/registry.test.mjs tests/runner.test.mjs tests/report_cli.test.mjs tests/wire_shape.test.mjs tests/memory_obligations.test.mjs tests/reasoning_obligations.test.mjs tests/knowledge_obligations.test.mjs tests/tool_obligations.test.mjs tests/model_obligations.test.mjs tests/speech_obligations.test.mjs tests/vision_obligations.test.mjs tests/planning_obligations.test.mjs tests/cast_obligations.test.mjs tests/runtime_obligations.test.mjs tests/remaining_fixtures.test.mjs tests/locality_egress_harness.test.mjs tests/locality_policy.test.mjs dist/locality/redteam.test.js dist/locality/learning_paths.test.js tests/refusal_decline.test.mjs dist/refusals/scope_matrix.test.js tests/independence_kit.test.mjs ../cognitive-core/tests/write_ahead_conformance.test.mjs
